chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2618, 2620 and 3072 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ CP No.D-2618/2025 1. For orders on CMA No.22518/2025 (Urgent Application) 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on Misc. No.12548/2025 4. For hearing of Misc. No.12044/2025 5. For hearing of main case CP No.D-2620/2025 1. For orders on CMA No.22520/2025 (Urgent Application) 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on Misc. No.12550/2025 4. For hearing of Misc. No.12050/2025 5. For hearing of main case CP No.D-3072/2025 1. For hearing of Misc. No.13460/2025 2. For hearing of main case 07.11.2025 Mr. Adil Channa, advocate for petitioners in CPsD-2618 & 2620/2025 Mr. Darvesh K. Mandan, advocate for petitioner in CPD-30720/2025 Dr. Shahnawaz Memon, and Mr. Imad Qamar, advocates for the respondents Urgency granted. Learned counsel for the respondent points out that all items seized from the petitioners have been returned. He states that pursuant to the judgment of the Taj International1 no criminal proceedings shall be initiated prior to adjudication. He further states that the department shall take adjudication recourse vide resort to show cause notice etc. and the same shall be concluded in accordance with law. Learned counsel further states that in view hereof these petitions appear to have served their purpose and may be disposed of accordingly. Learned counsel for the petitioners articulate no cavil to the aforesaid. These petitions are disposed of accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected petitions listed above.

These petitions are disposed of accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected petitions listed above. Judge Judge B-K Soomro 1 Directorate of Intelligence and Investigation-FBR vs. Taj International (Pvt.) Ltd; 2025 PTD 1270.
